# programs.starship

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.starship`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.starship.configPath` | `string` | Relative path to the user’s home directory where the Starship config should be stored. |
| `programs.starship.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable starship. |
| `programs.starship.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.starship.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.starship.enableInteractive` | `boolean` | Only enable starship when the shell is interactive. This option is only valid for the Fish shell. |
| `programs.starship.enableIonIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Ion integration. |
| `programs.starship.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.starship.enableTransience` | `boolean` | The TransientPrompt feature of Starship replaces previous prompts with a custom string. This is only a valid option for the Fish shell. |
| `programs.starship.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.starship.extraPackages` | | |
| `programs.starship.package` | `package` | The starship package to use. |
| `programs.starship.presets` | `list of string` | Preset files to be merged with settings in order. |
| `programs.starship.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/starship.toml . |
